hard_gates.condition: Closure must cite current report or evidence files.
hard_gates.required_disposition: closed_with_evidence only when direct evidence exists

hard_gates.condition: A progress ledger is the only support.

residual_risk: Closure is bounded to fixture-local evidence and current command output files.
claim_boundary: This closure policy governs only the good_single_skill fixture. It does not prove runtime checker execution, fixture coverage, CLI checks, tests, suite automation, package publication, code-contract validation, release readiness, or future AI behavior without separate current evidence.
